title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following solutions to the urban housing crisis, then decide which two would be most effective for making housing more accessible.
options: Encouraging remote working to reduce city overcrowding
Repurposing empty commercial buildings as housing
Investing in new sustainable housing developments outside cities

script.text: Now decide which two would be most effective for making housing more accessible.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to housing and urban planning. Discuss the following solutions to the urban housing crisis, then decide which two would be most effective for making housing more accessible. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
